releaseNotes:
## ControlZebra v0.3.0-beta

- Fixed Windows updater relaunch flow getting stuck on "The app will relaunch momentarily"
- Fixed update download progress reporting so total size and percent update correctly
- Added a standard "Launch ControlZebra" option on the installer finish screen

Please report issues at https://github.com/ControlZebra/controlzebra-releases/issues
